mapper.select: SELECT MAX(t.date) FROM spot_transactions t WHERE t.date <= #{asOfDate} AND ( t.spot_price IS NOT NULL OR t.chng_spot_price IS NOT NULL OR t.gen_amount IS NOT NULL )

SELECT t.gen_type_id AS genTypeId, MIN(t.date) AS minDate, MAX(t.date) AS maxDate, COUNT(1) AS recordCount FROM spot_transactions t WHERE t.date <= #{asOfDate} AND t.gen_type_id IN (1, 2, 3) GROUP BY t.gen_type_id

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(MIN(t.contract_start_date), '%Y-%m') AS minPeriod, DATE_FORMAT(MAX(t.contract_start_date), '%Y-%m') AS maxPeriod, COUNT(1) AS recordCount FROM longterm_transactions t WHERE t.contract_start_date <= #{asOfDate}
SELECT AVG(t.spot_price) FROM spot_transactions t WHERE t.date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND t.spot_price IS NOT NULL

SELECT t.chng_spot_price AS price, c.name AS companyName, t.gen_type_id AS genTypeId, t.date AS priceDate FROM spot_transactions t JOIN companies c ON c.id = t.company_id WHERE t.date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND t.chng_spot_price IS NOT NULL ORDER BY t.chng_spot_price DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT t.chng_spot_price AS price, c.name AS companyName, t.gen_type_id AS genTypeId, t.date AS priceDate FROM spot_transactions t JOIN companies c ON c.id = t.company_id WHERE t.date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND t.chng_spot_price IS NOT NULL ORDER BY t.chng_spot_price ASC LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT t.date) FROM spot_transactions t WHERE t.date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND ( t.spot_price IS NOT NULL OR t.chng_spot_price IS NOT NULL )
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM spot_transactions t WHERE t.date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND ( t.spot_price IS NULL OR t.chng_spot_price IS NULL )
SELECT '现货市场' AS type, t.date AS importDate, COUNT(1) AS added FROM spot_transactions t WHERE t.date <= #{asOfDate} GROUP BY t.date ORDER BY t.date DESC LIMIT 3

SELECT '中长期市场' AS type, COALESCE(t.transaction_date, t.contract_start_date) AS importDate, COUNT(1) AS added FROM longterm_transactions t WHERE COALESCE(t.transaction_date, t.contract_start_date) <= #{asOfDate} GROUP BY COALESCE(t.transaction_date, t.contract_start_date) ORDER BY importDate DESC LIMIT 2
